headline: Micron Technology (MU) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift As AI Memory Demand Drives Analyst Optimism
summary: Micron Technology’s fair value estimate has been lifted from $584.62 to $866.60, a sizable reset of where some analysts think the stock now sits. That shift reflects research arguing that AI driven demand and a tight memory market, especially in DRAM and high bandwidth memory, are already playing a central role in Micron Technology’s story, while others question how much optimism is already priced in. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving analyst narrative...

headline: Is Micron Technology, Inc. (MU) the Stock with the Best Earnings Growth for the Next 3 Years?
